obligation_statement: Content must be admitted only through the typed ingress template.
anti_collapse_rule: Content ingress must not become administrative ingress; contract must not become runtime COM interface.
notes: Establishes typed/template admission as the only valid content ingress law.

obligation_statement: The correct ingress family must be selected: validating or hot-path.
enablement_family_names: Contract Template Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Validating and hot-path variants must not collapse.
notes: Preserves validation-placement distinction while keeping timestamp participation mandatory.

obligation_statement: The hot-path must not silently reintroduce assembler-local validation.
enablement_family_names: Contract Template Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Hot-path no-validation semantics must not be replaced by hidden assembler-local validation.
notes: Keeps externalized validation path explicit.

obligation_statement: The Validator must only participate where validation authority is assembler-local.
enablement_family_names: Mechanism Hosting Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Validator must not participate in hot-path externalized validation.
notes: Validator is a mature mechanism host but only within validating ingress.

obligation_statement: Timestamp stabilization must participate in both validating and hot-path flows.
governed_object_names: Timestamp Value;Envelope Timestamp Field;Log Level Envelope
enablement_family_names: Mechanism Hosting Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Timestamp Stabilizer is mature and mandatory, not a placeholder or optional slot.
notes: Closes timestamp placeholder by assigning enforcement to Timestamp Stabilizer.

obligation_statement: Accepted content must be transformed into a Log Level Envelope and must not remain raw content as runtime carrier.
enablement_family_names: Envelope Handling Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Raw content must not remain the final runtime carrier.
notes: Envelope Assembler realizes the authoritative runtime carrier before server-side admission.

obligation_statement: Policies must enter through the administrative/ecosystem path, not through content ingress.
anti_collapse_rule: Policy bundles must not enter through consuming content ingress.
notes: Separates administrative policy provisioning from content admission.

obligation_statement: Policy Object identity and readiness must be preserved.
anti_collapse_rule: Policy Object must not be flattened into anonymous configuration fields.
notes: PolicyAssigner tracks assignment readiness without executing behavior.

obligation_statement: Policy assignment must be mediated by the PolicyAssigner.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatcher;Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Queue Bundle Agent;Single Queue Moderator;Timestamp Stabilizer;Validator
anti_collapse_rule: Host components must not self-source policies or bypass PolicyAssigner.
notes: PolicyAssigner is the administrative mediator.

obligation_statement: Each policy-consuming component must expose an administrative assignment surface.
anti_collapse_rule: Administrative assignment surface must not be confused with managerial execution surface.
notes: Every eligible host must expose assignment readiness without making Policy Object executable.

obligation_statement: A component realizes policy-governed behavior locally; the Policy Object does not execute behavior.
anti_collapse_rule: Policy Object must not be treated as behavior implementation or executor.
notes: Component-as-Host doctrine is enforced here.

obligation_statement: Policy replacement must respect safe-point rules.
anti_collapse_rule: Policy replacement must not occur during unsafe local mechanism execution.
notes: Protects runtime correctness during policy substitution.

obligation_statement: Metadata directives must be accepted only through administrative/ecosystem path.
enablement_family_names: Contract Template Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Metadata directives must not enter through consuming content ingress.
notes: Metadata authority remains administrative.

obligation_statement: Metadata Injector must not be bypassed.
anti_collapse_rule: Metadata must remain schema/directive-governed and must not become policy mechanism hosting.
notes: Metadata Injector applies schema-guided metadata without EN-FAM-002.

obligation_statement: Metadata must be applied to the envelope composition process, not treated as arbitrary content payload.
enablement_family_names: Envelope Handling Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Metadata must not be flattened into raw content payload.
notes: Metadata participates in Log Level Envelope composition.

obligation_statement: Metadata authority must remain distinct from consuming ingress.
enablement_family_names: Boundary / Exclusion Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Metadata authority must not collapse into content ingress authority.
notes: Preserves Three Surface Law for metadata.

obligation_statement: Operational directives must be treated as administrative control input.
anti_collapse_rule: Operational directives must not be treated as log content.
notes: Administrative/control path governs operational mode input.

obligation_statement: Operational directives must affect queue eligibility, progression, or operational state.
supporting_entity_names: Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Single Queue Moderator
anti_collapse_rule: Operational directives must not remain inert administrative metadata.
notes: Queue Bundle Agent realizes directive impact over queue structures.

obligation_statement: Writable unavailability must not be hidden.
governed_object_names: Writing Round Waiting List;Queue Container Identifier
anti_collapse_rule: Writing waiting list must store queue-container identifiers, not envelopes.
notes: Writable readiness or degradation must be explicit.

obligation_statement: Queue ordering must conform to active policy semantics.
supporting_entity_names: PolicyAssigner;Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: Policy Object governs ordering semantics but does not execute queue ordering.
notes: Queue Bundle Agent hosts policy-conforming queue orchestration.

obligation_statement: Registry readiness must be observed before handoff.
anti_collapse_rule: Dispatcher must not handoff blindly.
notes: Registry readiness is an explicit dependency.

obligation_statement: Dispatcher must not dispatch blindly into an unavailable or capacity-blocked registry.
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope handoff must be gated by readiness/capacity.
notes: Prevents blind registry handoff.

obligation_statement: Dispatcher is the only assembler-side handoff edge.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry
anti_collapse_rule: Registry / Delivery Port must not replace Dispatcher as actor.
notes: Dispatcher Boundary Law is enforced at handoff.

obligation_statement: Registry access must be boundary-sufficient only.
anti_collapse_rule: Registry access must not become registry internal ownership.
notes: Registry / Delivery Port exposes only boundary-sufficient receiving access.

obligation_statement: Delivery-cycle flags must be updated as state and must not be conflated with detailed reports.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Single Queue Moderator
anti_collapse_rule: Delivery-Cycle Flag Set must not be treated as Dispatcher Feedback Report.
notes: Expanded in 04.03 into seven flag sub-responsibilities.

obligation_statement: Assembler must not claim registry-side lifecycle after valid handoff.
anti_collapse_rule: Assembler-side authority must end after valid handoff.
notes: Prevents registry internal lifecycle ownership.

obligation_statement: Log Level Envelope must contain accepted content, metadata, and stabilized timestamp.
supporting_entity_names: Metadata Injector;Timestamp Stabilizer;Validator when validating path applies
enablement_family_names: Envelope Handling Enablement;Metadata / Timestamp Preparation Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope assembly must not bypass metadata or timestamp preparation.
notes: Defines authoritative carrier composition.

obligation_statement: Raw content must not replace the envelope as runtime transport unit.
supporting_entity_names: Envelope Assembler;Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: Raw content must not be admitted as runtime carrier.
notes: Assembler Ingress Port receives the already realized envelope.

obligation_statement: Envelope identity must be preserved through round progression.
primary_enforcing_entity_names: Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope movement must not be confused with queue-container identity.
notes: Round progression must preserve envelope identity while operating through queue-container slots.

obligation_statement: Lifecycle authority transfers only at valid dispatcher-registry handoff.
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope lifecycle authority must not transfer before valid handoff.
notes: Defines lifecycle boundary transition.

obligation_statement: Slot occupancy must not be confused with envelope lifecycle ownership.
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope Slot Occupancy is binding/state only, not lifecycle ownership.
notes: Protects queue occupancy semantics.

obligation_statement: Read/query responsibilities must not become assembler responsibilities.
anti_collapse_rule: Read/query world must remain outside assembler authority.
notes: Defines negative authority contract.

obligation_statement: Consuming, administrative, and managerial surfaces must not collapse.
primary_enforcing_entity_names: Assembler Ingress Port;Administrative / Ecosystem Port;Registry / Delivery Port
anti_collapse_rule: Administrative control must not enter through consuming ingress; consuming content must not enter through admin path.
notes: Preserves Three Surface Law across ports.

obligation_statement: Dispatcher remains the final assembler-side boundary.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry
anti_collapse_rule: Registry / Delivery Port must not replace Dispatcher as final assembler-side actor.
notes: Reasserts Dispatcher Boundary Law.

obligation_statement: Contracts remain typed/template laws, not runtime COM interfaces.
primary_enforcing_entity_names: Envelope Assembler;Assembler Ingress Port;Administrative / Ecosystem Port;Registry / Delivery Port
governed_object_names: Typed Content Contract;Ingress Contract Variants;Receiving Admission Access
anti_collapse_rule: Contract layer must not be modeled as runtime COM interface layer.
notes: Preserves static-polymorphism/template doctrine.

obligation_statement: Policy Object remains a semantic governor, not an implementation executor.
anti_collapse_rule: Policy Object must not execute behavior; components host mechanisms.
notes: Preserves Policy Object and Component-as-Host doctrine.

obligation_statement: Queue must remain the container.
supporting_entity_names: Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: No separate runtime container may be introduced above Queue Container.
notes: Queue equals Container.

obligation_statement: Queue Bundle Agent must operate over queue bundles.
supporting_entity_names: Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Single Queue Moderator
anti_collapse_rule: Queue Bundle Agent must not replace Single Queue Moderator.
notes: Bundle-level orchestration is distinct from single queue-container moderation.

obligation_statement: Single Queue Moderator must operate over one queue-container.
anti_collapse_rule: Queue Runtime Layer must not be used as delegated entity.
notes: Single Queue Moderator is the actual single queue-container carrier.

obligation_statement: Slots must remain inside queue-container semantics.
anti_collapse_rule: Slot must not be treated as independent container outside queue-container.
notes: Preserves slot containment inside Queue Container.

obligation_statement: Envelope occupancy must be represented as binding/state.
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope occupancy binding must not imply lifecycle ownership.
notes: Occupancy records that an envelope occupies a slot.

obligation_statement: Slot lifecycle must support release, readiness, and requalification.
anti_collapse_rule: Slot lifecycle is local runtime state, not registry-side envelope lifecycle.
notes: Slot lifecycle state enables later waiting-list discipline.

obligation_statement: Post-delivery completion must restore waiting discipline where required.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Queue Bundle Agent
governed_object_names: Slot Lifecycle State;Delivery Round Waiting List;Queue Container Identifier
anti_collapse_rule: Post-delivery completion must not leave queue-container identifiers stranded.
notes: Restores delivery-side waiting discipline.

obligation_statement: Writing waiting list must store queue-container identifiers, not envelopes.
governed_object_names: Writing Round Waiting List;Queue Container Identifier
anti_collapse_rule: Writing waiting list must not store Log Level Envelopes.
notes: Waiting list stores locators to queue-containers.

obligation_statement: Delivery waiting list must store queue-container identifiers, not envelopes.
governed_object_names: Delivery Round Waiting List;Queue Container Identifier
anti_collapse_rule: Delivery waiting list must not store Log Level Envelopes.
notes: Delivery waiting list stores locators to queue-containers.

obligation_statement: Queue Container Identifier must locate queue-container only.
primary_enforcing_entity_names: Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: Queue Container Identifier must not be treated as envelope identity.
notes: Locator semantics remain queue-container-specific.

obligation_statement: Requalified queue-container IDs must return to the correct waiting list.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Writing / Feeding Round Manager
governed_object_names: Queue Container Identifier;Slot Lifecycle State;Delivery Round Waiting List;Writing Round Waiting List
anti_collapse_rule: Requalified ID must not be routed to the wrong round discipline.
notes: Preserves writing/delivery waiting-list discipline.

obligation_statement: Detailed feedback reports must remain separate diagnostic/reporting artifacts.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Single Queue Moderator;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Dispatcher Feedback Report must not be treated as Delivery-Cycle Flag Set.
notes: Expanded in 04.04 into five detailed report sub-responsibilities.

obligation_statement: Ownership and occupancy language must not introduce a separate runtime container.
supporting_entity_names: Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
governed_object_names: Queue Container;Envelope Slot Occupancy;Log Level Envelope;Queue Container Identifier
anti_collapse_rule: Queue equals Container; occupancy is binding/state; envelope lifecycle is separate.
notes: Terminology guard preserves the corrected queue-container model.
